regional_loan_quality_1997: [{"region":"west Bohemia","finished_loans":22,"defaulted_finished_loans":5,"default_rate":0.22727272727272727,"avg_salary":9061.666666666666,"male_share":0.4},{"region":"south Bohemia","finished_loans":23,"defaulted_finished_loans":5,"default_rate":0.21739130434782608,"avg_salary":8824.38,"male_share":0.48},{"region":"central Bohemia","finished_loans":31,"defaulted_finished_loans":5,"default_rate":0.16129032258064516,"avg_salary":9304.493506493507,"male_share":0.42857142857142855},{"region":"north Moravia","finished_loans":41,"defaulted_finished_loans":6,"default_rate":0.14634146341463414,"avg_salary":9589.29357798165,"male_share":0.4954128440366973},{"region":"south Moravia","finished_loans":41,"defaulted_finished_loans":6,"default_rate":0.14634146341463414,"avg_salary":8947.725190839694,"male_share":0.4961832061068702}]
sql:
SELECT d."A3" AS region,
       COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status IN ('A','B')) AS finished_loans,
       COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'B') AS defaulted_finished_loans,
       COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'B')::numeric /
         NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status IN ('A','B')), 0) AS default_rate,
       AVG(d."A11")::numeric AS avg_salary,
       COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) FILTER (WHERE c.gender = 'M')::numeric /
         NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id), 0) AS male_share
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN district d ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN client c ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
WHERE l.date <= DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY default_rate DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT d."A3" AS region,
       COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status IN ('A','B')) AS finished_loans,
       COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'B') AS defaulted_finished_loans,
       COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'B')::numeric /
         NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT l.loan_id) FILTER (WHERE l.status IN ('A','B')), 0) AS default_rate,
       AVG(d."A11")::numeric AS avg_salary,
       COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) FILTER (WHERE c.gender = 'M')::numeric /
         NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id), 0) AS male_share
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN district d ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN client c ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
WHERE l.date <= DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY default_rate DESC NULLS LAST
